BERKSHIRE HAS CHOSEN NOT TO APPEAL THE DENIAL OF CONFIDENTIALITY AS TO THESE SECURITIES EVEN THOUGH BERKSHIRE BELIEVES THAT ITS CONFIDENTIALITY REQUEST WAS APPROPRIATE.
